Hi everyone, I’m Logan! I enjoy collaborating and finding solutions together, so I’m looking forward to discussing our suspicions and working as a team. I believe that open communication is key, and I'm here to help us figure this out!
Hey everyone, I’m Alex! I love diving into discussions and figuring out puzzles with all of you. I’m pretty competitive, so I’m excited to see who can outsmart the Mafia and keep things interesting!

Hey everyone, I'm Dana! I'm all about lively discussions and love bouncing ideas off each other to crack this mystery. I tend to be pretty outgoing, so I'm excited to hear your thoughts and work together to uncover the truth!

Hi everyone, I'm Jordan! I enjoy thoughtful discussions and prefer to take a disciplined approach when solving problems. I'm looking forward to collaborating with all of you to uncover the truth and make this an engaging experience!

ACTION: Kill Logan
